allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project CountePreAlpha.xcodeproj -scheme Counter -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPad Pro 13-inch \(M4\)' build)
Bash(git commit -m 'Organize models into semantic folder hierarchy *)
Bash(gh pr create --title 'Organize models into semantic folder hierarchy' --body 'Restructures the Models folder with logical subfolders: *)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/TattooSession/Session/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/CustomDiscount/Discount/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/CustomSessionType/SessionType/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/CustomGalleryGroup/GalleryGroup/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/CustomEmailTemplate/EmailTemplate/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/InspirationImage/PieceImage/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/ImageGroup/SessionProgress/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/\\.imageGroup/\\.sessionProgress/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/imageGroups/sessionProgress/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Models Views Services App -type f -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/sessionProgresss/sessionProgress/g' {} \\;)
Bash(git commit -m 'Refactor models: simplify naming and improve structure *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Organize services into domain-based folder hierarchy *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Update pbxproj file references for Services folder hierarchy *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix pbxproj: add Services subgroups and move views to correct groups *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix pbxproj: add Models subgroups and fix all file references *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix pbxproj: move GalleryGroup from Configuration to Gallery group *)
Bash(find Counter -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/final class SessionType/final class SessionCategory/g; s/\\bSessionType\(\\b/SessionCategory\(/g' {} \\;)
Bash(find Counter -name "*.swift" -exec sed -i '' 's/final class EmailTemplate/final class SavedEmailTemplate/g' {} \\;)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/case edit\(EmailTemplate\)/case edit\(SavedEmailTemplate\)/g; s/case fromBuiltIn\(EmailTemplate\)/case fromBuiltIn\(SavedEmailTemplate\)/g; s/@State private var category: EmailTemplate\\.TemplateCategory/@State private var category: SavedEmailTemplate.TemplateCategory/g; s/ForEach\(EmailTemplate\\.TemplateCategory/ForEach\(SavedEmailTemplate.TemplateCategory/g; s/let template = EmailTemplate\(/let template = SavedEmailTemplate\(/g' Counter/Views/Admin/Settings/SettingsViewEmailTemplateEditor.swift)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/extension EmailTemplate:/extension SavedEmailTemplate:/g; s/@Query\(sort: \\\\EmailTemplate\\.name\) private var customTemplates: \\[EmailTemplate\\]/@Query\(sort: \\\\SavedEmailTemplate.name\) private var customTemplates: [SavedEmailTemplate]/g; s/@State private var editingTemplate: EmailTemplate?/@State private var editingTemplate: SavedEmailTemplate?/g; s/@State private var customizingBuiltIn: EmailTemplate?/@State private var customizingBuiltIn: SavedEmailTemplate?/g; s/ForEach\(EmailTemplate\\.TemplateCategory/ForEach\(SavedEmailTemplate.TemplateCategory/g; s/let category: EmailTemplate\\.TemplateCategory/let category: SavedEmailTemplate.TemplateCategory/g' Counter/Views/Admin/Settings/SettingsViewEmailTemplates.swift)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/let template: EmailTemplate?/let template: SavedEmailTemplate?/g; s/@Query\(sort: \\\\EmailTemplate\\.name\) private var customTemplates: \\[EmailTemplate\\]/@Query\(sort: \\\\SavedEmailTemplate.name\) private var customTemplates: [SavedEmailTemplate]/g; s/@State private var selectedTemplate: EmailTemplate?/@State private var selectedTemplate: SavedEmailTemplate?/g; s/@State private var editingCustomTemplate: EmailTemplate?/@State private var editingCustomTemplate: SavedEmailTemplate?/g; s/ForEach\(EmailTemplate\\.TemplateCategory/ForEach\(SavedEmailTemplate.TemplateCategory/g; s/let category: EmailTemplate\\.TemplateCategory/let category: SavedEmailTemplate.TemplateCategory/g' Counter/Services/Communication/EmailService.swift)
Bash(git commit -m 'Resolve naming conflicts from model renames *)
